response.overview: Rick “The Fish” Fisher grows up with a deep love for baseball, but his childhood is marked by severe mental and physical abuse. After serving in the Vietnam War, he unknowingly falls into heroin addiction, beginning a long struggle with drugs, broken relationships, and emotional pain. Though he continues to pursue baseball, his life becomes increasingly chaotic as he searches for love, acceptance, and meaning. As his addiction takes a heavy toll, Rick reaches a critical crossroads that will ultimately challenge him to confront his past and reconsider the direction of his life.
response.tagline: Striking out in life is not the end of the game
response.title: Still Pitching
